visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black beret and a sheer black off-the-shoulder top over a grey tank top, stands in a large commercial warehouse store. She holds a white cardboard cake box containing a round cake. Behind her are industrial refrigerated shelves filled with various packaged cakes and pastries. The lighting is bright and even, typical of a retail environment. (2) The camera transitions to an extreme close-up of the cake inside the box. The cake is white with a thick layer of translucent, yellowish peach cubes and jelly on the top center. The texture appears moist and glossy. No people are visible in this specific frame, only the product. (3) A metal cake server lifts a triangular slice of the cake from a white plate. The cross-section reveals layers of white sponge cake alternating with thick layers of white cream and embedded fruit pieces. The background is a grey marbled countertop under bright indoor lighting. (4) Two women are seated at a white table indoors. The first woman from the previous scenes is on the left, and a second woman wearing a black and white patterned bucket hat is on the right. They are gesturing toward the cut cake on the table while talking and expressing various facial reactions including surprise and delight. The background is a softly lit domestic interior with a partial view of a room and shelves.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 8寸白桃優格生乳蛋糕. [Variety]: 499元竟然滿滿桃子. (2) [Subtitle]: 祝你生日快樂. (3) [Subtitle]: 謝謝. 這來做生日蛋糕超划算哎. (4) [Subtitle]: 白桃罐頭. (5) [Subtitle]: 下面很多白桃果肉哎. 誠意誠意. (6) [Subtitle]: 白桃優格生乳蛋糕. (7) [Variety]: 好多好多果肉. (8) [Variety]: 有一點甜.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator in the first half, joined by a second female participant in the second half.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Young woman with long black hair, wearing a black beret, a sheer black top, and a grey inner garment.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Industrial refrigerated cake shelves in a warehouse store (Costco) and a modern domestic dining area with white walls and a grey marble table.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, energetic female voice introduces a product over a bouncy, medium-tempo electronic background music with a clear four-on-the-floor beat. The voice is expressive and fast-paced. (2) A bright 'ding' sound effect triggers as a price appears on screen. The BGM remains constant. The speaker continues describing the cake's size and price. (3) A subtle digital whoosh sound accompanies a quick visual cut. The vocal quality shifts slightly as the speaker moves from an echoing supermarket acoustic to a more controlled, dry indoor environment. (4) Two female voices overlap briefly in a friendly, conversational manner. They discuss the ingredients (peaches) with rising intonations of excitement. The BGM maintains its consistent volume and upbeat rhythm until the end.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Unboxing -> Detailed Review -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to review a specific new cake from Costco, highlighting its low price point and high volume of fruit content to attract bargain-hunting foodies.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: A consumer-style review without explicit sponsorship markers.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical social media editing styles including vibrant text overlays and fast-paced narration to maintain viewer engagement during a food review.
